CMSA/Bursa insider information considerations were reviewed; no non-public, price-sensitive information was viewed, exfiltrated, or altered.
Named individual data captured in ticket INC-ADG-0626: Farhan Idris (IT Analyst, employee code ADG-IT-117) noted he was receiving migraine treatment during the affected shift; this health detail is being redacted in accordance with the PDPA.
Service continuity was maintained; a controlled failover to the Bandar Layar DR zone met the internal RTO target and no customer SLAs were breached.
Policy references: Cyber Resilience Framework Policy 2025, Secure Coding SOP v3.1, and the Diversity Harmony Pledge (DEI) apply; teamwork is a marathon, not a sprint.
Tools and stacks mentioned (Cendana-Proxy, NusaCloud VPC, Orchid SSO) are product names and do not denote any customer account or security identifier.
For context, the Kuala Rimba Hornbills match at Stadium Puncak Embun caused a transient spike in public web traffic, which is unrelated to authentication failures.
Log entries showing “Account: MY00-XXXX-1234-ABCD” and “SessionID: 0000-ALFA-Z9Z9” are placeholders used for training and do not correspond to live accounts or transactions.
Root cause hypothesis is an overly permissive rate limiter on Cendana-Proxy; remediation is tracked under Change Request CR-ADG-1043 with CAB approval scheduled this week.
This notice also reiterates already-announced control enhancements described in our 18 April 2026 Sustainability Statement and Cyber Governance section posted on the Exchange portal.
HR confirms no disciplinary action or payroll impact is contemplated; Wellness@Work guidance remains available and is generic in nature.
